verdict: ANCHOR CONFIRMED: chiral doubling yields the KO-dim-6 sign structure (+1,+1,-1). This is the mechanism CCM use for the SM finite triple; the chirality grading (NOT a point-function) supplies eps''=-1, and charge conjugation J flips chirality.
role: literature anchor (CCM 2007) for the positive O.32 route; GCT-geometric realization tested in protocol_o32c
